# club-mcp LLM context

This project builds read-only MCP access to Hyper Human Club / Fluent Community REST API.

Core constraints:

- TypeScript-first implementation.
- pnpm workspace with `@hhc-mcp/core`, `@hhc-mcp/stdio`, `@hhc-mcp/http`.
- v1 is read-only only.
- All upstream REST calls are GET-only.
- No generic REST proxy tool.
- Each user uses their own WordPress Application Password.
- Local stdio is privacy-first and recommended.
- Hosted public mode uses OAuth 2.1 protected resource server plus encrypted WordPress connect flow.
- Cloudflare Tunnel is origin protection; Cloudflare Access is optional private edge protection, not public MCP auth.
- Zod validates tool inputs, tool outputs, and upstream REST responses.
- Upstream JSON starts as unknown.
- No secrets or content payloads in logs.

Start with:

- docs/stack-decision.md
- docs/architecture.md
- docs/variants.md
- docs/read-only-tools.md
- docs/security-checklist.md
- docs/adr/001-typescript-first.md
